name: dry-codes
description: Reuse before you write. Bundles the dry-codes skill + the hosted Dry Codes public-corpus MCP server (/mcp/public) so Codex searches indexed public code/docs for an existing implementation before writing a new one.

interface.shortDescription: Reuse before you write — search indexed public code & docs.
interface.longDescription: Searches the Dry Codes public corpus (a hosted MCP server) for existing code and docs to reuse, and flags near-duplicates — so Codex looks for an implementation before writing one.
